text:
Quiet week, just a massive model drop and real-time voice.

Added Claude Opus 4.8, Perplexity Sonar, and StepFun Step 3.5 Flash to the lineup. We also hooked up a real-time voice API via WebSocket, so your apps can finally talk back without the awkward pause.

Oh, and active generations now refresh their storage TTL on access—meaning if people keep looking at your pixels, they stay alive forever. Docs are updated in the repo.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #generativeai #buildinpublic #llm
